op.ANTAL.potential.1.event.description.text: Ultimate Overclocked Moment improved: Electric Amp and Heat Amp effects are increased to 1.1 times the original.

op.ANTAL.potential.2.event.description.text: Ultimate Overclocked Moment improved: Ultimate Energy cost -10%.

op.ANTAL.potential.3.event.description.text: When an enemy with an active Focus debuff is defeated, return 15 SP.

op.ANTAL.potential.5.event.description.text: Applying Focus on the same target for 20s increases Electric Susceptibility and Heat Susceptibility effects by 4%.

op.ANTAL.skill.EMP_TEST_SITE.event.descr.text: When an enemy with active Focus suffers a Physical Status or Arts Infliction. Triggers 1 energy explosion on the enemy that deals Electric DMG and applies another stack of the same Physical Status or Arts Infliction.

op.ANTAL.skill.EXCHANGE_CURRENT_BATK.eve.text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Electric DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.ANTAL.skill.EXCHANGE_CURRENT_DIVE.eve.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Electric DMG to nearby enemies.

op.ANTAL.skill.EXCHANGE_CURRENT_FINISHER.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Electric DMG and recovers some SP.

op.ANTAL.skill.OVERCLOCKED_MOMENT.event..text: Applies temporary Electric Amp and Heat Amp to the entire team.

op.ANTAL.skill.SPECIFIED_RESEARCH_SUBJEC.text: Applies Focus with a long duration on the enemy and deals Electric DMG. An enemy with an active Focus also suffers Electric Susceptibility and Heat Susceptibility. Focus can only be applied to 1 enemy at any given time.

op.ANTAL.status.FOCUS.event.description.text: Applies Focus with a long duration on the enemy and deals Electric DMG. An enemy with an active Focus also suffers Electric Susceptibility and Heat Susceptibility. Focus can only be applied to 1 enemy at any given time. At P5, the last 40s of Focus applies a stronger Susceptibility effect (Empowered Focus).

op.ANTAL.status.IMPROVISER.event.descrip.text: After an Amped teammate's skill deals DMG, Antal restores the said teammate's HP by [108 + Strength×0.9]. This HP restoring effect triggers 1 time every 30s for each operator.

op.ANTAL.status.OVERCLOCKED_MOMENT_AMP.e.text: Applies temporary Electric Amp and Heat Amp to the entire team.

op.ANTAL.talent.IMPROVISER_TALENT.event..text: After an Amped teammate's skill deals DMG, Antal restores the said teammate's HP by [108 + Strength×0.9]. This HP restoring effect triggers 1 time every 30s for each operator.

op.ANTAL.talent.SUBCONSCIOUS_ACT_TALENT..text: Gains 30% chance of Physical DMG immunity and restores HP of self by [45 + Strength×0.38].
